input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.3.1.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.3.1.4
            TITLE: officials may impound any non approved driver equipment until the end of the competition.

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.3.1.4: Officials may impound any non approved Driver Equipment until the end of the competition.
VE.3.1.4 Officials may impound any non approved Driver Equipment until the end of the competition.

final_answer: Officials may impound any non approved Driver Equipment until the end of the competition.
